arts.ttl: Newcastle and Chelsea lead chase for Liverpool goalkeeper
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Chelsea are among the frontrunners to sign Caoimhin Kelleher from Liverpool this summer. Kelleher is expected to move on at the end of the campaign as he targets a first-choice role. Despite emerging as an excellent understudy at Liverpool, the 26-year-old has been unable to dislodge Alisson Becker as number one. arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano delivers bad news on Virgil van Dijk contract
arts.sum: Both Salah and Van Dijk see their contracts expire at the end of the season and Anfield Edition claimed that the duo had signed on for two more years and that the news would soon become official. Fabrizio Romano has delivered bad news on Virgil van Dijk contract's situation, denying that the Dutch centre back has penned a new deal.
